title: Sinocism
author: Bill Bishop
description: Essential analysis of Chinese politics, foreign policy, and elite CCP governance by the veteran creator of Sinocism.

title: Pekingnology
author: Zichen Wang / CCG
description: Providing translations, policy deep-dives, and sharp perspectives from inside Beijing's domestic policy networks and CCG scholars.

title: ChinaTalk
author: Jordan Schneider
description: Highly acclaimed explorations of Chinese tech policy, semiconductor supply chains, geopolitical defense developments, and pop culture.

title: Trivium China Briefs
author: Trivium China Experts
description: Weekly analytical briefings tracking the elite policy actions, domestic regulations, and macro-reforms drafted inside Zhongnanhai.

title: MERICS China Briefing
author: MERICS Research Team
description: European insights, industrial policy critiques, and bilateral strategic breakdowns from Europe's leading China research institute.

title: Carnegie China Insights
author: Carnegie Scholars
description: Scholarly research and policy insights mapping the geopolitical and diplomatic footprints of China across global spheres.

title: The Wire China
author: The Wire China Journalists
description: Weekly investigative reports tracking corporate listings, economic transitions, and business footprints in Greater China.

title: RealTime Mandarin (每周漫闻)
author: Andrew Methven
description: An exceptional weekly newsletter showcasing contemporary Chinese vocabulary, social trends, idioms, and internet slang from Chinese media. Perfect for Intermediate/Advanced learners.

title: VOA News 中文网
author: Voice of America Chinese
description: Standard native-level current affairs, economy, and global updates written in professional Simplified Chinese. Perfect for HSK 5/6 advanced vocabulary and translation studies.
